Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Claim Of Apreea Armstrong, Points And Authorities And Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 551-9544 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Apreea Armstrong is Granted with ten days leave to file an amended claim from notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
